reviews.comment:
Un desastre paren a cargar combustible más adelante. Te dicen que tienen MODO pagás y no te hacen la promo, te dan cualquier QR. Un desastre

(Translated by Google)
A disaster. Stop to refuel further down the road. They tell you they have a payment plan, you pay, and they don't honor the promotion; they just give you any old QR code. A disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkM0xEMDFnRRAB
